faq.question: Does storm risk risk affect property insurance in Franklin?
faq.answer: Insurance premiums in Franklin can be influenced by storm risk risk. Higher-risk properties may face higher premiums or excesses. A full climate report includes insurance cost projections.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 4.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
